text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf looks unusually bleary-eyed
today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
One might say that. I fear I got a little absorbed
in my reading.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Punnery is a truly bottomless art. Did you know that overly elaborate rhymes can make a joke less amusing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brevity is the soul of wit, indeed. Timing is as
crucial in comedy as it is in racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how I racked my brain, I couldn't
think of a good punchline. Before I knew it, it was
past midnight...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You could say it wasn't very much... pun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's grogginess seems to have had a
serious effect on the quality of her jokes.
